target: 15. Preparing for Mio's Visit
(She should be coming again tonight. The Shadow Mio...)
(Look at the big picture... What I need to do right now is...)
(Anyway... I have to survive today.)
(At this rate, Totsumura-san is going to be killed by her in front of our house tonight.)
(To avoid that situation…)
Yes, Hero of Justice speaking!
Hello, Totsumura-san?
Ah, Shinpei-kun! What is it? I'm busy reading right now.
Reading… What are you reading?
<color=#GF_TIPS_086>Game Playboy</color>.
What are you reading during work…?
Of course I'm reading it! It has a gravure spread of Kaori-chan in it!?
Ah~~~! There really are angels in this world.
R-Right...

So, what's the matter?
You didn't call just to chat, did you?
Ah, um…!
(I can't exactly say "You're going to be killed tonight." How should I steer this conversation...)
Check the patrol route
Stage a disturbance to redirect

Totsumura-san, isn't it time for your patrol?
What route are you taking?
What route...? Explaining it verbally is a pain.
I always pass in front of Kofune. Don't worry.
I see…
(I figured... Even if I shift the time, I can't eliminate the possibility of him running into her.)
(I need to find a way to make him change his route.)
(But how? I can't tell him not to come…)
(…That's right!)
By the way, Totsumura-san. Haven't you heard about that?
What do you mean?
I heard a rumor that some drunks are fighting over by the harbor.
Huh!? What's that about? I haven't gotten any reports like that!
Really? Then you might want to hurry.
The area around Kofune is fine for today, so you should probably go check that out instead...
Okay, I'm going right away!
(I'll make up an incident to keep Totsumura-san away...!)

Um…
There's actually a brawl happening.
...Wh-What!? A brawl!!?
Yes, it's turning into a huge mess!
Does that mean you're at the scene, Shinpei-kun!? Are you okay!?
Yes, I'm fine.
I see, thank goodness...! So, where is it!?
Over by the harbor. It seems like customers are getting into a huge fight at a bar...
What!? Don't tell me it's at "Miyako"...
Got it, I'll be right there! You be careful too, Shinpei-kun!
Please do!
Phew…
(...Was that a bad idea? I just made a false report, though)
(But with this, Totsumura-san won't pass by Kofune and should be safe from getting killed.)
...I'll have to be prepared to get yelled at.
(If nothing happens, that's for the best. If all it takes is me getting yelled at, it's a small price to pay.)
(I told Sou that I'd contact him tomorrow.)
Now then...
(My smartphone. I'll delete unnecessary apps and photos...)
(Now my phone has about 7GB of storage left... That should be plenty of recording time.)
(Airplane mode, just in case a call comes in. Fully charged. And I'll connect it to a power bank too.)
(Luckily, I know what time she's coming.)
(I'll hide my phone in the potted plants so she won't see it... and start recording.)
(I'll film Mio's Shadow and get proof...!!)
Phew…
(Even knowing she won't be here for a while, that made me super nervous...)
(Now I'm sweating like crazy. Mio should be in the bath, so I'll just wash my face to calm down.)
(After that... no matter how bad I feel, I absolutely won't go outside for fresh air. Then I'll be fine...)
(Because on the first 22nd, I wasn't killed...!!)
Huh!?
My <color=#GF_TIPS_113>right eye's color</color> is different... since when...?
!! My head... h-hurts...
…Mio?

(…No response.
I can hear the shower running…)

Mio!
Are you there…?
(…Could it be… the Shadow…)
Mio!!?
Ah…
...Ha... ...Haaaaah!!?
Guh!!
Idiot! Idiot! Idiot! Idiot! Idiot!
I-I'm sorry...
(Big picture! Big picture!! Big picture!!!)

(Mio is safe!!
…Yeah!)
